validation_rules.rule_description: subject.entity_id must exist as a valid entity_id in the RC2 canonical_entity_registry v1.1.0-rc2.
validation_rules.error_message_template: Rule {rule_id}: subject.entity_id '{value}' not found in RC2 registry v1.1.0-rc2.

validation_rules.rule_description: object.entity_id must exist as a valid entity_id in the RC2 canonical_entity_registry v1.1.0-rc2.
validation_rules.error_message_template: Rule {rule_id}: object.entity_id '{value}' not found in RC2 registry v1.1.0-rc2.

validation_rules.rule_description: Each condition entity_id (when present) must exist in the RC2 registry.
validation_rules.error_message_template: Rule {rule_id}: conditions[{index}].entity_id '{value}' not found in RC2 registry.

validation_rules.rule_description: Each dependency entity_id must exist in the RC2 registry.
validation_rules.error_message_template: Rule {rule_id}: dependencies[{index}].entity_id '{value}' not found in RC2 registry.

validation_rules.rule_description: Each remediation target_entity_id must exist in the RC2 registry.
validation_rules.error_message_template: Rule {rule_id}: remediations[{index}].target_entity_id '{value}' not found in RC2 registry.

validation_rules.rule_description: Each conflict entity_id must exist in the RC2 registry.
validation_rules.error_message_template: Rule {rule_id}: conflicts[{index}].entity_id '{value}' not found in RC2 registry.

validation_rules.rule_description: subject.entity_id and object.entity_id must not be identical (self-referential rules are forbidden).
validation_rules.error_message_template: Rule {rule_id}: subject and object entity_id are identical ('{value}'). Self-referential rules are forbidden.

validation_rules.rule_description: For semantic version_scheme, version_normalized must match pattern ^[0-9]+\.[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?(\.[0-9]+)?$ or wildcard x/X notation.
validation_rules.error_message_template: Rule {rule_id}: subject.version_constraint.version_normalized '{value}' is not valid for version_scheme 'semantic'.

validation_rules.rule_description: For semantic version_scheme, object version_normalized must be valid semver.
validation_rules.error_message_template: Rule {rule_id}: object.version_constraint.version_normalized '{value}' is not valid for version_scheme 'semantic'.

validation_rules.rule_description: Condition version_normalized must be valid for its declared version_scheme.
validation_rules.error_message_template: Rule {rule_id}: conditions[{index}].version_normalized '{value}' is not valid for version_scheme '{scheme}'.

validation_rules.rule_description: Remediation target_version must be a non-empty string representing a valid upgrade target.
validation_rules.error_message_template: Rule {rule_id}: remediations[{index}].target_version is empty or missing.

validation_rules.rule_description: confidence must be a number between 0.0 and 1.0 inclusive.
validation_rules.error_message_template: Rule {rule_id}: confidence value '{value}' is outside the valid range 0.0-1.0.

validation_rules.rule_description: confidence must meet the minimum threshold for the declared rule_type.
validation_rules.error_message_template: Rule {rule_id}: confidence '{value}' is below the minimum threshold '{threshold}' required for rule_type '{rule_type}'.

validation_rules.rule_description: evidence_id must match pattern ^EVID-[A-Z0-9]+-[0-9]+$.
validation_rules.error_message_template: Rule {rule_id}: evidence[{index}].evidence_id '{value}' does not match required pattern.

validation_rules.rule_description: evidence source_document_id must match pattern ^DOC-[A-Z0-9]+$.
validation_rules.error_message_template: Rule {rule_id}: evidence[{index}].source_document_id '{value}' does not match pattern ^DOC-[A-Z0-9]+$.

validation_rules.rule_description: evidence source_type must be from the allowed source_type vocabulary.
validation_rules.error_message_template: Rule {rule_id}: evidence[{index}].source_type '{value}' is not a valid source_type.

validation_rules.rule_description: evidence source_excerpt must be non-empty.
validation_rules.error_message_template: Rule {rule_id}: evidence[{index}].source_excerpt is empty or missing.

validation_rules.rule_description: evidence confidence_score must be 0.0-1.0.
validation_rules.error_message_template: Rule {rule_id}: evidence[{index}].confidence_score '{value}' is outside range 0.0-1.0.

validation_rules.rule_description: At least 1 evidence record is required when status is approved.
validation_rules.error_message_template: Rule {rule_id}: status is 'approved' but evidence array is empty. Minimum 1 evidence record required.

validation_rules.rule_description: predicate must be from the 20-item registered relationship vocabulary.
validation_rules.error_message_template: Rule {rule_id}: predicate '{value}' is not a registered relationship type in the compatibility vocabulary.

validation_rules.rule_description: status transitions must follow the allowed transition matrix.
validation_rules.error_message_template: Rule {rule_id}: transition from '{from_state}' to '{to_state}' is not permitted by the lifecycle model.

validation_rules.rule_description: archived is a terminal state. No transitions are permitted from archived.
validation_rules.error_message_template: Rule {rule_id}: status is 'archived'. No transitions are permitted from the archived terminal state.

validation_rules.rule_description: approved_by and approved_at must both be non-null when status is approved.
validation_rules.error_message_template: Rule {rule_id}: status is 'approved' but {field} is null or missing. Both approved_by and approved_at are required.

validation_rules.rule_description: rule_id is required and must be non-empty.
validation_rules.error_message_template: Rule {rule_id}: rule_id is missing or empty.

validation_rules.rule_description: rule_type is required and must be one of the 6 defined values.
validation_rules.error_message_template: Rule {rule_id}: rule_type is missing, empty, or not a valid rule type.

validation_rules.rule_description: subject object is required and all its sub-fields must be present.
validation_rules.error_message_template: Rule {rule_id}: subject is missing or incomplete. Required sub-fields: entity_id, component_name, knowledge_category, version_constraint.

validation_rules.rule_description: object is required and all its sub-fields must be present.
validation_rules.error_message_template: Rule {rule_id}: object is missing or incomplete. Required sub-fields: entity_id, component_name, knowledge_category, version_constraint.

validation_rules.rule_description: evidence array is required (may be empty for candidate rules but cannot be absent).
validation_rules.error_message_template: Rule {rule_id}: evidence field is absent. An empty array [] is acceptable for candidate rules but the field must be present.

validation_rules.rule_description: remediations array is required (may be empty for feature_support_added rules but cannot be absent).
validation_rules.error_message_template: Rule {rule_id}: remediations field is absent.

validation_rules.rule_description: rule_id must be globally unique. No two rules may share the same rule_id regardless of lifecycle state.
validation_rules.error_message_template: Duplicate rule_id detected: '{value}'. rule_id must be unique across all rules.

validation_rules.rule_description: No two approved rules may be exact duplicates. Identity defined by rule_type, subject.entity_id, predicate, object.entity_id, condition_logic, and conditions fingerprint.
validation_rules.error_message_template: Rule {rule_id}: Potential duplicate of approved rule '{duplicate_id}'. Review before approval.

validation_rules.rule_description: Severity must be within the allowed values for the declared rule_type.
validation_rules.error_message_template: Rule {rule_id}: severity '{value}' is not allowed for rule_type '{rule_type}'. Allowed severities: {allowed}.

validation_rules.rule_description: condition_logic must be AND or OR.
validation_rules.error_message_template: Rule {rule_id}: condition_logic '{value}' is invalid. Must be AND or OR.

validation_rules.rule_description: source_document should match at least one evidence[].source_document_id.
validation_rules.error_message_template: Rule {rule_id}: source_document '{value}' does not match any evidence[].source_document_id. Verify source traceability.

validation_rules.rule_description: sequence_step is required for update_order_constraint rules.
validation_rules.error_message_template: Rule {rule_id}: rule_type is 'update_order_constraint' but sequence_step is missing.

validation_rules.rule_description: sequence_prerequisite_ref is required when rule_type is update_order_constraint and sequence_step >= 2.
validation_rules.error_message_template: Rule {rule_id}: sequence_step >= 2 but sequence_prerequisite_ref is missing.

validation_rules.rule_description: sequence_prerequisite_ref must not create a circular reference chain.
validation_rules.error_message_template: Rule {rule_id}: sequence_prerequisite_ref creates a circular chain via '{chain}'.

validation_rules.rule_description: incompatible_combination rules must have at least 2 conditions to define the prohibited pair.
validation_rules.error_message_template: Rule {rule_id}: rule_type is 'incompatible_combination' but conditions array has fewer than 2 entries.

validation_rules.rule_description: source_document must match pattern ^DOC-[A-Z0-9]+$.
validation_rules.error_message_template: Rule {rule_id}: source_document '{value}' does not match required pattern ^DOC-[A-Z0-9]+$.

validation_rules.rule_description: rule_id must match the canonical pattern ^CRULE-[A-Z0-9]+-[0-9]{3,}$.
validation_rules.error_message_template: Rule {rule_id}: rule_id '{value}' does not match required pattern ^CRULE-[A-Z0-9]+-[0-9]{{3,}}$.
